hero.title: Music in Villafranca
hero.subtitle: An encounter with classical excellence in the historic heart of El Bierzo.

about.title: Our Essence
about.p1: Inspired by the magic of the great European summer festivals, Música en Villafranca was born to create a perfect symbiosis between the town's rich monumental heritage and international artistic excellence. A gathering where the stones of the Castle and the sacred acoustics of San Nicolás come alive through the greatest works of history.
about.p2: Here, we completely eliminate the traditional barriers between the stage and the audience. Through a circular stage setup and absolute complicity, we invite each spectator to shed preconceived ideas, forget the noise of the world, and transform into a true musical pilgrim.

venue.title: Historic Venues
venue.description: Monuments where music finds its perfect acoustics.

tickets.title: Reserve Your Seat
tickets.description: Secure your place at one of the region's most exclusive cultural events. Seat reservations available for all venues.

seo.title: Music in Villafranca | International Classical Music Festival
seo.description: Discover the most prestigious classical music festival in Villafranca del Bierzo. Enjoy unique concerts with international artists in a historical setting.

venues_page.title: Monumental Venues
venues_page.subtitle: The resonance of historic stone. Exceptional acoustics in monumental heritage altars and fortresses of El Bierzo merge with the musical experience to create an unparalleled spiritual and artistic appointment.

programacion_page.title: 2026 Festival Agenda
programacion_page.subtitle: A sensory journey through music in the millennial stages of El Bierzo.

manifesto.hero_subtitle: The Origin of a Musical and Mystical Dream
manifesto.hero_intro: Nestled in the heart of the Camino de Santiago, Villafranca del Bierzo transcends its condition as a monumental jewel to become an immense living stage. Here, amid centuries-old stone and the overwhelming silence of the valleys, classical music finds its purest and most transformative resonance.
manifesto.memory_intro: Relive the magic, emotion, and immersive atmosphere of concerts held in past years.
manifesto.why_p1: There is a vital, intimate, and unbreakable bond that unites the Halffter family with the town of the Burbia river. The birthplace of the distinguished pianist Marita Caro and a family summer refuge for decades, Villafranca is the origin of this passion.
manifesto.why_p2: Under the artistic direction of Pedro Halffter Caro, the festival is born from an absolute conviction: "Villafranca already provides the monumental scenography; our task is to fill it with music of the highest quality".
manifesto.mission_1_text: To fuse international musical excellence with the sacred and historical acoustics of unparalleled venues such as the Church of San Nicolás or the solemn Castle Courtyard.
manifesto.mission_2_text: To articulate an artistic program that dialogues intimately with the mysticism, inner search, and experiences of the pilgrim passing through the ancient Door of Forgiveness.
manifesto.mission_3_text: To break rigid protocols. Through circular staging that embraces the performer and warm pedagogical commentary, we transform the spectator into an authentic "musical pilgrim".
